title: Rule-UI-Theme
description: JSON schema for the Rule-UI-Theme class definition (Rule-Obj-Class). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed runtime and provenance fields are intentionally omitted.

pyClassName.description: The fully qualified class name being defined.

pyLabel.description: Display label shown in Dev Studio class browser.

pyDescription.description: Human-readable description of the class purpose.

pyClassGroup.description: Class group value returned by the live theme class record.

pyClassGroupIndicator.description: Class group indicator returned by the live theme class record.

pyUsage.description: Usage note for the class definition.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset for the current instance. The OOTB source is typically Pega-UIEngine; a branch copy should resolve in the active branch ruleset.

pyRuleSetName.description: Ruleset name for the current instance. Do not treat this as a fixed constant across live and branched copies.

pyRuleAvailable.description: Availability status returned by the live theme class record.

pyAllowLocking.description: Locking flag for the class definition.

pyAppletHarness.description: Harness used by the class form.

pyAutogeneratedKey.description: Autogenerated key flag for the class definition.

pyBaseRule.description: Base-rule flag for the class definition.

pyCreateDedicatedTable.description: Dedicated-table flag for the class definition.

pyPreventSubClassing.description: Subclass-prevention flag for the class definition.

pyExcludeFromFTIndex.description: Full-text-index exclusion flag for the class definition.

pyEncryptBLOB.description: BLOB encryption flag for the class definition.

pyOrgDivision.description: Organization division context for the class rule.

pyFormType.description: Form type returned by the live theme class.

pyDisplayMode.description: Display mode for the class form.

pyDecisioningBaseClassName.description: Decisioning base class name when the platform populates it for this class.

pyMTInstanceOverrideAndVisibility.description: Instance override and visibility setting for the class definition.
